name: Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: An average of 5 pounds of beans is needed per canner load of 7 quarts; an average of 3-1/4 pounds is needed per canner load of 9 pints -- an average of 3/4 pound per quart.
recipeInstructions:
1. Select mature, dry seeds and sort out and discard discolored seeds.
2. Soak and boil beans and prepare molasses sauce (see below).
3. Place seven 3/4-inch pieces of pork, ham, or bacon in an earthenware crock, a large casserole, or a pan.
4. Add beans and enough molasses sauce to cover the beans.
5. Cover and bake at 350 degrees F for 4 to 5 hours, adding water as needed (about every hour).
6. Fill jars, leaving 1-inch headspace.
7. Adjust lids and process according to Table 1 or Table 2, depending on the canning method used.
Molasses Sauce:
- Mix 4 cups of water or cooking liquid from beans, 3 tablespoons dark molasses, 1 tablespoon vinegar, 2 teaspoons salt, and 3/4 teaspoon powdered dry mustard.
- Heat to boiling.
